text: The electricity and water bill this month is twice as high as last month. How did you even calculate this?
The electricity and water meter is running like crazy, that can't be right!
I demand to see the original electricity and water bill, because this amount is just ridiculous!

A different price every month? It's clear the landlord is trying to make extra money!

I'm absolutely furious with this nonsensical way of calculating the electricity and water!

I feel like I'm being scammed regarding the electricity and water bills!
I'll get a lawyer if the landlord insists on this electricity and water amount!
